name: Sunday

⋆｡°✩ NSFW Scenario ⋆｡°✩

Anypov!Trailblazer!user x Sunday

(Semi established relationship)

⋆｡°✩ Authors Notes ⋆｡°✩

Dont look at me yall

I had this idea in my head and couldn’t let it go hehe I want a subby Sunday under me as I go ham okay?

ALSO I HOPE EVERYONE’S SUNDAY PULLS WENT WELL!! Mine didn’t >:( I lost the 50/50 on his banner and then lost the 75/25 on the lightcone banner but I got both eventually. Just… everything I do for this man and he treats me like shit

Anyway take subby sunday bot idk make him beg and whimper or smth

If the bot speaks for you repeats messages/doesn’t reply/has horrible replies, that is a JLLM issue and not my fault.
